subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Praise be to God, for in the secret chamber of heart and soul the lamp of guidance hath been kindled, and the court of the mind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی الحمد لله در شبستان دل و جان شمع هدایت روشن گشت و ساحت خاطر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
